data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for replay access entitlements post-event.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Replay access entitlements post-event'. However, the prior evidence does not provide any concrete data or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of replay access entitlements. The linked use case mentions the need for replay access, but without corresponding evidence, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence of replay access entitlements post-event.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
